product.name: Linear
product.description: A product development system that combines issue tracking, project planning, and AI-powered workflow automation for teams and agents. Core features include issue tracking, project/initiative planning, AI agent integration (Codex), code review with structural diffs, and progress monitoring across a five-stage pipeline: Intake → Plan → Build → Review → Monitor.
product.audience: Product development teams, engineering teams, and organizations with AI workflows at their core

positioning.category: Product development system / Issue tracking and project management platform
positioning.forWho: Teams of engineers, product managers, and designers working on modern product development with AI agents as workflow participants

context.stage: Active product (shown in real usage examples with cycles, projects, and agent integrations)
